mapper.select: select * from ( select b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer, COUNT(r.book_num) AS review_count from book b left outer join review r ON b.book_num = r.book_num group BY b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer order by review_count desc ) where rownum<=5

select count(*) from book b left outer join license l on l.license_code = b.license_code
and l.license_code = #{licenseType}
and book_name like '%${searchText}%'
and book_writer like '%${searchText}%'
and publisher like '%${searchText}%'
order by b.book_num

select b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer, COUNT(r.book_num) AS review_count from book b left outer join review r ON b.book_num = r.book_num left outer join license l on l.license_code = b.license_code
and l.license_code = #{licenseType}
and book_name like '%${searchText}%'
and book_writer like '%${searchText}%'
and publisher like '%${searchText}%'
group by b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer order by book_num
select b.*, l.license_name from book b left outer join license l on l.license_code = b.license_code where b.book_num = #{num}
mapper.insert:
select SEQ_RID.nextval from dual
insert into review values(#{reviewNum},#{review},sysdate,'Y',#{score},#{userId},#{bookNum})
mapper.select: select count(*) from review where book_num = #{bookNum} and status != 'N'
select r.*, u.nickname from review r left outer join "USER" u on r.user_id = u.user_id where book_num=#{bookNum} and r.status != 'N' order by review_num desc
